title: Assertion fault when window functions are used.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value VARCHAR(255), num FLOAT, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (value, num) VALUES ('test1', 1.5), ('test2', NULL), ('test3', 3.0);
CREATE TABLE another_table (ref_id INT, FOREIGN KEY(ref_id) REFERENCES test_table(id));
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT id AS c FROM test_table) AS t) AS sub WHERE c IN (SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER() FROM (SELECT 0) AS v);
key_bug_features: Assertion fault with row_number() in window functions
